NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-30-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01

THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, VINCENT KIRCHER SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT JOSE ARCE FOR 1272 MARKET, #407, SAN FRANCISCO. THE LEASE ON THIS PROPERTY IS FORFEITED. A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL 6-13-95. THERE WILL NOT BE ANY FURTHER STAYS OF EXECUTION. DEFENDANT, JOSE ARCE, SHALL WAIVE ALL CLAIMS AGAINST PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT IS THE SOLE OCCUPANT OF THE PREMISES. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON THE PREMISES, AFTER THE DEFENDANT VACATES, WILL BECOME THE PROPERTY OF THE PLAINTIFF. IN THE EVENT THE PLAINTIFF, JOSE ARCE, VACATES THE PREMISES AND TURNS IN THE KEYS TO PLAINTIFF, BY 6-13-95, PLAINTIFF WILL EXECUTE A STIPULATION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND WILL DISMISS THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $12.07 FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT
